text:
NAME: OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1932A_SPO_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This data element is triggered by a value of “03” (1932(a) state plan option to use managed care for 
MCO and PCCM programs) in any instance of MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
